message:
refactor(tty_audio): extract frame validation and reject sequence gaps on finalize

Extract inline metadata checks into validate_audio_frame_metadata() and
call it from both decode_frames_to_raw_with_policy and the pipeline
adapter ingest path. Add a contiguous-sequence check in finalize_wav()
so gapped frame sets are rejected before WAV assembly, leaving the
adapter open for retransmit repair. Two new tests cover both paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
